feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: HCM rule
entry.content:
Hello, I am trying to create new professional groups, but when validating this rule I cannot find the meaning of:
                  NUM=D GRPR

I don't know what table D is or if is another value.

Thanks,

entry.title: PU19 Error in Generating PDF
entry.content:
Hello, 

what could be the possible cause of these errors? I already checked the ADS and it its working fine, the forms are also maintained in V_T5UX7

Note: It is working in Prod system but not working in Lower Environments

entry.title: Bonus Calculation Explanation - Variable Pay
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I need some explanation on bonus calculation. For our customer we use additive formula (base + individual). We also use guidelines for PM Rating that the employee are not eligible for bonus, if their pm rating is <3. We do not use business or team goals.

As you can see below, we notice that the final pay out field takes the same amount as the total target amount. The final pay out amount is coming from the base. We try to understand how the base is calculated. Can anyone please clarify the differences of these fields and how the base is calculated and where for the bonus calculation.

 

Last, our customer requires a custom calculation for the bonus and it is different from the system's.

Bonus Calculation Screenshot:

Your advice would be helpful.

Kind Regards,

Olga

entry.title: SAP HCM on premise ABAP
entry.content: I had started my career as HCM Abaper , i want to know what will be the better SAP Certification available for my role irrespective of CABAP_D and is there any link i can get expose to HCM S4 Hana on premise ABAP or H4S4 on premise ABAP learning modules.

entry.title: CREAR SUBCARACTERISTICA EN PE03
entry.content:
Hola:

Estoy tratando de crear un nuevo nodo para la caracteristica LGMST como tipo Subcaracteristica.

Al tratar de activar la subcaracteristica, el sistema me muestra el siguiente mensaje: " No se permite asignacion a subcaracteristica"

¿Alguien sabe como se ha de crear este tipo de nodo? La tengo definida como subcaracteristica en el aparatado de atributos, pero no se que ocurre. 

Gracias,

Miguel

entry.title: BP Sync issue with systemID
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have issue with BP sync with System ID .

We have PERNR updated with IT105 ,ST0001 with SystemID.

We ran BP sync #/SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE replication program, sync report is successful but when we check in SU01 for that user it is showing as Classic address but not business partner assignment.

Already verified SAP Note #3234879,  3228710 but we don't have BCS*  entries hence it is not relevant.

Please advise.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Will there still be an SAP HCM in ECC/S/4HANA certification next release?
entry.content: I wanted to plan my exam and saw that it's getting retired

entry.title: Return blank value using IF () in story report
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to populate a field value as below in story reports:

If Field Value matches to particular value, then Return "Last Modified Date Time" else Return Blank.

I tried to achieve it using IF () Function, but system is expecting second parameter of IF () Function also as Date Time type value, not blank. 

Any assistance would be really helpful.

entry.title: Can't find our code for GB Security Training in the Dynamic Business Event Menu.
Having Issue in changing status of employees from Loan interest bearing to int. Free
entry.content:
I have a PF Fund Loan (ZL10) in SAP HCM and need guidance on handling the following scenarios:

  1. An employee with an interest-bearing loan wants to switch to an interest-free loan.

    • What steps should I follow to successfully run payroll for the upcoming month with an updated payslip?
    • Do I need to process a special repayment first and then issue a new loan for the remaining amount without interest?

  2. An employee with an interest-free loan wants to switch to an interest-bearing loan.

    • If I process a special repayment in the last payroll run (e.g., 01.02.2025) and then create a new loan with interest effective 01.03.2025, SAP displays errors such as:
      • "Please maintain an interest rate for employee XXX."
      • "Please do not maintain an interest rate for employee XXX."
    • How can I resolve these errors and ensure a smooth payroll run? i am unable to run payroll ...

      need urgent help

      -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    •  

    •  

    •

entry.title: Schema and PCR for Absence deduction
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am currently new to SAP and working on a task where I need to deduct one day's absence. I have already created the absence and assigned the wage to the relevant infotypes (0008 and 0014). However, I now require assistance with writing the PCR (Personnel Calculation Rule) for this deduction and configuring the schema to run the international payroll.

Could you kindly guide me through the complete configuration process, from writing the PCR to ensuring the payroll schema runs correctly for the international payroll?

Your help and guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your time and support.

Best regards,

entry.title: Error P301 No entry in table T528 for S 500XXXXX
entry.content:
I'm using the "HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA" function to create employee infotypes 0000, 0001, and 0002, but when I select the position I want to assign to the employee, I get the following error: "Error RP301 No entry exists in table T528B for S 50005802."

I checked the position in table T528 and if the record with its respective information is there, I validated the object's effective dates with the date I'm using in the employee registration, and they are the same: 01012025.
If I manually register the employee with that position, I don't get any errors.
Has anyone else experienced this error?

entry.title: Old admin accounts deactivation vs jobs and integrations
entry.content:
Hello, we would like to deactivate some old consultants accounts in our system but we see in the  Scheduled Job Manager and Integration Center that those  accounts  are associated  with  some  jobs ( as Job Owner  or Created by ) or integrations (as last modified). What  would  be the  impact  on the  jobs  and  integrations if we deactivate  those old  accounts? What  should we  have in mind  when doing so?

Thank you

entry.title: ZR35 Rule error
entry.content: When we run PT60,we are encountering an ZR35 error, Can someone help with this issue.

entry.title: API Odata V2 Events, empjob not pulling as of each event, but as of 1st employee record
entry.content:
Hi, using Odata V2 API to pull events is not pulling correctly. Its returning the oldest record for the employee, not their empjob data as of the event start date (effective date). I want to see all events for employees within a date range and have their EmpJob / user data show as of the event start date. I can do this in reporting in successfactors (story & table reports) so I know it CAN work . 

When I run the API Call i get the first sequence of user data for any event. one EE has 10 events since being hired (including a promotion, manager changes, etc.) and on each of them shows his user detail as of his hire event (sequence 1)

I tried it 2 ways EmpJob without any Nav fields 

/odata/v2/EmpJob?$format=JSON&$select=localJobTitle,endDate,event,seqNumber,eventReason,jobTitle,startDate,managerId&$filter=userId eq '74395'&fromDate=2023-01-01&toDate=2025-03-28

and EmpJob with Nav fields

odata/v2/EmpJob?$format=JSON&$expand=eventReasonNav,employmentNav&$select=eventReasonNav/event,eventReasonNav/externalCode,eventReasonNav/name,eventReasonNav/startDate,eventReasonNav/status,eventReasonNav/internalCode,businessUnit,managerId,localJobTitle,userId&$filter=userId eq '74395'&fromDate=2023-01-01&toDate=2025-03-28

entry.title: Possibilities and Limitations of GROW with SAP - Core HR Add-On
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am exploring the GROW with SAP – Core HR Add-On and would like to understand its full capabilities and constraints.

Since there is very little documentation or resources available on this subject, we are facing immediate challenges in implementation. Specially because client has purchased the GROW with SAP - Core HR Add-On license but has not opted for the SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC) license. We are trying to understand the full scope of what this add-on offers and its limitations compared to a full SuccessFactors EC implementation.

Could the SAP community help clarify:

Core Functionalities: What HR functionalities are available with the Core HR Add-On?

Limitations: What key features from SuccessFactors EC are not included in the Core HR Add-On?

Integration Possibilities: How does it integrate with other SAP modules (like Payroll, Time Tracking, or S/4HANA)?

Customization and Extensibility: Can we configure or extend this solution to meet specific client needs?

Implementation Considerations: Are there any best practices or challenges to keep in mind when deploying this add-on?

Since this is a new area with limited insights, any real-world experience, documentation, or reference materials would be highly valuable to us and the broader SAP community.

 

Warm Regards,

Aratrika Bardhan

entry.title: How to eliminate splits for a particular wage type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When there is IT0186 conversion in mid of the month, say exempt to PF, the basic pay and other allowances (AW) are split into 2 and the corresponding PF rates are applied on the 2nd half of the month (which is correct as per the standard).

But our requirement is, for particular annual bonus, company needs to pay PF for full amount if IT0186 status change is before 15th and no contribution if IT0186 status change is after 15th. How to achieve that in SAP PCR? 

Your help is much Appreciated. Thanks

entry.title: Error in Employee as a Business Partner and Synchronization with HCM Data
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to sync SAP user ID with BP. While creating communication, system is giving the below error

Whereas person no 5 do not exists in the system (While trying to delete the same via PA30-->Utilities -> Delete Personnel Number or via SE38--> RPUDELPN)

 

your help is much appreciated.

Thanks

Sumanta

entry.title: Fiori Leave Request App – Default Date Always Set to Tomorrow instead of Today
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently using SAP Fiori for managing absence requests in our S/4HANA On-Premise system, and it's working well overall. However, we face a small but frustrating issue with the default date behavior.

When employees are submitting absence requests (for example home office), the system automatically sets the next day’s date (i.e., tomorrow) as the default date. This is fine if someone is planning ahead, but it's really inconvenient when submitting the request at the end of the current day.

For instance, if I try to submit an absence for today (April 7th), the system always defaults to April 8th, requiring me to manually change the date to today.

We would like to change this default behavior so that the system always proposes today’s date instead of the next day.

I checked SPRO Configuration: 

Here, we have the following options for "Proposal of next absence date":

The D option currently results in tomorrow’s date being suggested, which is causing the issue.

Has anyone come across this issue? Is there a way to configure SAP Fiori or adjust via a BAdI to set today’s date as the default proposal instead of tomorrow’s date?


Thank you in advance

Best regards

entry.title: Notificacion de SDI no se genera en reporte S_AHR_61015994
entry.content:
Buen día Expertos,

Al momento de realizar una recontratación de un empleado a una nueva Unidad Organizativa (UO), o movimiento de una UO a otra, se genera el infotipo 0372 con la fecha de recontratación correctamente, pero cuando se ejecuta el reporte S_AHR_61015994 para dicho empleado; NO se genera notificación de SDI al IMSS.

Actualmente he revisado que los infotipos esten correctos, IT0006, IT0007 e IT0009, además he revisado la tabla V_T5F99K2 y todo se ve correcto.

Agradezco de antemano su apoyo para tratar de resolver este caso.
